title: MVP v0.1 — Monorepo bootstrap + Auth + Dashboard + Terminal + Files + Settings + Packaging
note: Reconstructed historical record. The MVP was implemented and shipped before the .arceus/changes/ mechanism existed (which began with v0.1.1-consolidation on 2026-05-14). Authoritative implementation plan: /home/mike/.claude/plans/whimsical-scribbling-sloth.md. This folder exists for version-history continuity — proposal/spec/tasks are short reconstructions, not the original artefacts.
commits: 9d464e5 feat: scaffold MVP — auth, dashboard, terminal, files, packaging

in: Phase 0 — pnpm + Turbo monorepo, TypeScript, ESLint, shared @dinopanel/shared (pure ESM Zod schemas + WS protocol)
Phase 1a — NestJS 11 + Fastify + Drizzle + better-sqlite3 (WAL) + pino
Phase 1b — JWT auth, bcrypt, refresh-token rotation, Throttler 5/min
Phase 2a — Vite 6 + React 19 + Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui + i18n + theme
Phase 3 — Dashboard with systeminformation 1Hz singleton broadcaster + Recharts
Phase 4 — Web SSH via node-pty + xterm.js (multi-tab, resize, heartbeat)
Phase 6 — Settings (change password, theme, language, about)
Phase 7 — systemd unit + install.sh + build-release.sh + docs
out: Bundle splitting / size reduction (deferred to v0.1.1)
Production root posture + fs errno mapping (deferred to v0.1.2)
Docker, websites, databases, firewall, scheduler, logs (later versions)

verification.manualSmoke: All 7 phases verified green by user 2026-05-14: login flow, refresh-token rotation, rate-limit, dashboard metrics WS, terminal pty echo, file CRUD
verification.automated: None at v0.1 — Vitest + Playwright added in v0.1.1

keyDecisions: @dinopanel/shared kept pure ESM — relies on Node 22.12+ require(esm); explicitly NOT dual ESM/CJS (tried, broke)
WebSocket via raw ws package + Fastify httpServer.upgrade hook — NOT @nestjs/websockets (forces Socket.IO)
SPA fallback via fastifyStatic onSend hook rewriting 404→index.html — NOT setNotFoundHandler (conflicts with Nest)
Single port: API + WS + SPA all on 9999; vite dev 5173 via proxy
FilesService.resolvePath() rejects ../, null byte, relative paths, and dangerous deletes (/, /etc, /usr, /var, /root)
knownDebtAtTimeOfShipping: Web bundle 1.37 MB → 400 kB gzip (still big; addressed in v0.1.1)
node-pty native build fragile across OS (install.sh prebuild added in v0.1.1)
Files compress/extract UI missing (eventually shipped in backlog-files-compress-extract-ui)
fs errno not mapped to HTTP status (addressed in v0.1.2)
Production root posture not enforced (addressed in v0.1.2)
